name: made-json
description: Skills for bootstrapping and maintaining made.json feeds.

interface.shortDescription: Create and maintain made.json feeds with agent skills.
interface.longDescription: Agent-readable setup and publisher skills for discovering creator-made apps, skills, prompts, workflows, agents, tools, and other software, drafting evidence-backed made.json feeds, maintaining existing feeds, and validating changes before publication.
defaultPrompt: Create a made.json feed for this workspace.
Update and validate this made.json feed.
